name: mimica
description: Cursor Agent Companion with character-driven UI

scripts.dev:companion: pnpm --filter @mimica/shared build && pnpm --filter @mimica/character-runtime build && pnpm --filter @mimica/agent-orchestrator build && pnpm --filter @mimica/companion dev
scripts.package:companion:mac: pnpm --filter @mimica/shared build && pnpm --filter @mimica/character-runtime build && pnpm --filter @mimica/agent-orchestrator build && pnpm --filter @mimica/companion package:mac
